Appearances on WED-JUL-06-2016:
Plaintiff Allen Mitchum is present.
Attorney Kathryn Quetel for the plaintiff.
Defendant Armando Morales is present.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants, and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case does NOT settle. The trial date of July 11, 2016 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
